title: onagra jamesii
intro: Onagra jamesii, also known as James' Evening Primrose or Evening Primrose of the West, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Onagra jamesii include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting heart health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
